decks.notes: The deck focuses on using instant reanimator cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Quantum Riddler to bring powerful creatures like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Griselbrand back from the graveyard. It also utilizes cards like Faithful Mending and Ephemerate to draw cards and protect your combo pieces. Thoughtseize helps disrupt the opponent's game plan while cards like Solitude and Force of Negation provide removal and counterspells to control the board. The mana base is designed to support the deck's colors and ensure consistent casting of spells.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts and creatures to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their strategy with cards like Pithing Needle and Tormod's Crypt. Emry, Lurker of the Loch provides recursion for artifacts, while Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke offer control options. Urza's Saga helps generate additional artifacts to fuel the deck's synergies, and Mishra's Bauble provides card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive elements, utilizing the affinity mechanic to maximize efficiency.

The key strategy of this deck is to utilize the Dredge mechanic to quickly fill the graveyard with cards, allowing for the recursion of powerful creatures like Arclight Phoenix. The deck aims to quickly mill through the library, triggering cards such as Creeping Chill and Life from the Loam to generate value and apply pressure to the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes burn spells like Lava Dart and Conflagrate to control the board and close out the game. This aggressive combo strategy allows for explosive turns and the potential for quick victories.

This deck focuses on quickly putting out artifact creatures and utilizing artifact synergies to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats. It aims to generate value through sacrificing artifacts like Mishra's Bauble with cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Claws of Gix. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Tormod's Crypt and Metallic Rebuke to control the opponent's game plan. With cards like Arcbound Ravager and Weapons Manufacturing, the deck can quickly grow its creatures and close out the game efficiently. The key concept is to leverage artifact synergies for a fast and aggressive win.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts, especially those that can be sacrificed for various effects, to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive creatures. It also includes disruptive elements like Tormod's Crypt and Metallic Rebuke to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck aims to establish a strong presence early in the game and maintain pressure with efficient threats like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, while also having the flexibility to handle different situations through cards like Pithing Needle and Engineered Explosives.

The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck aims to efficiently deal damage to the opponent's life total while controlling the board with removal spells and resilient threats. Cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury provide early pressure, while Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment offer additional reach. The deck also includes powerful cards like The Legend of Roku and Voice of Victory to close out games decisively. Overall, the strategy is to maintain a fast and proactive game plan to outpace the opponent.

The deck focuses on combining aggressive creature cards with "blink" effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy and generate card advantage. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Consign to Memory, the deck can repeatedly trigger powerful enters-the-battlefield abilities and protect its own creatures. The use of cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd provides a strong aggro element, putting pressure on the opponent early in the game. Additionally, cards like Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Quantum Riddler add a level of unpredictability and flexibility to the deck's strategy.

This Aggro-Affinity deck focuses on generating fast mana through cards like Mox Opal and Urza's Saga to quickly cast threats like Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer. Utilizing artifacts like Mishra's Bauble and Engineered Explosives, along with disruptive cards like Tormod's Crypt and Sink into Stupor, the deck aims to control the board while pushing damage through with creatures like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Weapons Manufacturing. With a mix of card advantage, disruption, and efficient threats, this deck looks to overwhelm opponents with its aggressive game plan in the Modern format.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures while utilizing blink effects to protect your board and disrupt their strategy. The deck aims to maintain a strong board presence with creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Quantum Riddler, while using cards like Ephemerate and Teferi, Time Raveler to protect them and disrupt the opponent's plays. Fatal Push and Thoughtseize are used for additional removal and disruption, allowing the deck to maintain pressure and win the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on using artifacts and efficient creatures to quickly overwhelm opponents with damage. It includes cards that help generate mana and provide additional resources, as well as disruption and removal spells to control the board. By utilizing a mix of artifacts, creatures, and spells, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game and maintain a strong board presence to close out the match swiftly. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Mox Opal allows for recursion and acceleration, further supporting the aggressive strategy.

This deck focuses on a fast-paced aggressive strategy, utilizing creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to quickly deal damage to the opponent. Support cards like Galvanic Discharge and Thraben Charm help control the board while cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride provide additional threats. The deck also includes cards like Arena of Glory and Voice of Victory to provide combat advantage. Land cards like Marsh Flats and Arid Mesa help to ensure the deck runs smoothly and consistently.

The deck focuses on quickly building a strong and aggressive board presence through early creature drops like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, supported by burn spells and removal like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment. The deck also utilizes powerful cards such as Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to control the board and push for fast victories. Additionally, the deck includes hate cards like Blood Moon and Static Prison to disrupt opponents' strategies. The mana base consists of fetch lands and utility lands to ensure smooth gameplay.

The deck focuses on assembling specific pieces to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Allosaurus Rider and Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant. It utilizes cards like Eldritch Evolution and Neoform to search for key combo pieces, with protection from spells like Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer. The deck also includes ways to gain life and manipulate the graveyard, as well as support cards like Xenagos, God of Revels and Griselbrand for added value and game-winning potential. Overall, the deck aims to create explosive turns and overwhelming board states to win the game.

This deck focuses on aggression through quick, efficient creatures like Ragavan and Quantum Riddler while also utilizing blink effects like Ephemerate to protect and reuse key creatures like Phelia and Solitude. Consign to Memory provides card advantage and disruption, while Prismatic Ending and other removal help control the board. The deck has a strong mana base with fetch lands and dual lands to support its three-color requirements. The inclusion of Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and March of Otherworldly Light tie together the theme of illusion and deception.

The main focus of this Jeskai Control deck is to control the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and powerful creatures. By utilizing cards like Galvanic Discharge, Solitude, and Prismatic Ending, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while gradually building up its own resources. Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provides card advantage, while Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd offer additional threats on the battlefield. The deck also includes some powerful finishers like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Wrath of the Skies to close out the game once control has been established.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures, burn spells, and resource denial. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on with low-cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, while utilizing burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Goblin Bombardment to remove threats and push for damage. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and The Legend of Roku provide additional utility and resilience in longer games. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Seasoned Pyromancer and Thraben Charm to disrupt the opponent's game plan.
